name: Healing Salve
description: An herbal salve that restores 50 HP to a single target.

name: Mana Alloy
description: A crystallized alloy that restores 30 MP to a single target.

name: Blight Remedy
description: A potent antidote brewed from temple moss; cures poison and weakens the blight's hold.

name: Rejuvenating Moss
description: A patch of glowing moss that revives a fallen ally with 25% HP.

name: Vitality Incense
description: Smoldering incense that restores 80 HP to all party members.

name: Stamina Salts
description: Crushed minerals that remove fatigue and restore 20 MP.

name: Purification Herb
description: A rare herb that cures most status ailments, including the blight's corruption.

name: Midnight Dew
description: Dew collected under the eclipse; restores 15 HP and 15 MP.

name: Travel Ration
description: Dried meat and hard bread; restores 25 HP to one ally.

name: Blight Ward Incense
description: An incense that temporarily protects the party from blight-based attacks for a few steps.

name: Elder's Staff
description: A wooden staff passed down by village elders, channeling nature's energy.

name: Ritual Dagger
description: A ceremonial dagger used in ancient rites; sharp enough for combat.

name: Temple Bough
description: A branch from the corrupted temple tree, pulsing with residual magic.

name: Sunken Blade
description: A blade reforged from ancient shards; said to hold the memory of the temple's guardians.

name: Summoner's Robe
description: A deep-blue robe embroidered with summoning circles, increasing spirit affinity.

name: Hiker's Leather
description: Tough leather armor worn by Thestra's scouts; offers decent protection.

name: Guardian Plate
description: Ornate plate armor scavenged from a temple guardian's remains; heavy but sturdy.

name: Mystic Shawl
description: A shawl woven from spectral threads, granting resistance to dark magic.

name: Blight Ward
description: A small totem carved with protective runes; reduces damage from blight attacks.

name: Spirit Charm
description: A charm filled with captured spirit dust; strengthens summoned allies.

name: Seal of Purity
description: A medal awarded by Elder Aris after cleansing the temple; increases all stats modestly.

name: Echoing Ring
description: A ring that resonates with the temple's echoes; sometimes reveals hidden paths.

name: Token of Earth
description: A rough stone token infused with the essence of the earth; one of three needed for the cleansing ritual.

name: Token of Fire
description: A flickering fragment of flame crystallized into a token; one of three needed for the cleansing ritual.

name: Token of Shadow
description: A token that seems to absorb light, holding the essence of shadow; one of three needed.

name: Purification Stone
description: A radiant stone created by combining the three tokens; the key to breaking the blight's source.

name: Mina's Herbal Note
description: A crumpled note from Healer Mina describing the ritual ingredients she was seeking.

name: Sludge Sample
description: A vial of viscous sludge collected from the temple floors; can be used in alchemy.

name: Spirit Essence
description: The purified essence of a lesser spirit; used in summoning enhancement.

name: Golem Core Fragment
description: A piece of a golem's energy core; holds raw elemental power.

name: Blighted Claw
description: A claw twisted by the blight; may be used to craft blight-related items.

name: Echo Crystal
description: A crystal that vibrates with the whispers of the Hall of Echoes; useful for enchanted inks.

name: Decayed Bark
description: Bark from a decaying treant; can be ground into a weak antidote.

name: Shadow Wisp
description: A captured shadow wisp; used in rituals to bind dark energies.

name: Corrupted Blood
description: Blood from a corrupted creature; dangerous but potent in curses.

name: Ancient Dust
description: Dust from the temple's oldest corridors; carries faint magical residue.

name: Temple Stone
description: A chipped stone block from the temple architecture; can be pulverized for crafting.
